notes: Reflexivity/symmetry/transitivity of == follow by unfolding def:logical-equivalence (identical truth-table columns) and inheriting the corresponding properties of equality of truth-value functions -- so the single dep suffices. A reference to a general def:equivalence-relation (or to equality being an equivalence relation) is a candidate if the convention cites the inherited structure, but it reads as the conclusion's framing rather than a used premise; left unproposed.
